name: The Canandaigua National Bank and Trust Company
description_short: Canandaigua National Bank is a regional bank serving Greater Rochester and Finger Lakes, NY, offering personal and business checking, savings, mortgages, loans, and wealth management.
description_long: Canandaigua National Bank and Trust Company is a longstanding financial institution headquartered in Canandaigua, New York (72 South Main Street), serving the Greater Rochester and Finger Lakes region. The bank operates under NMLS ID 50 with routing number 022303659 and maintains FDIC insurance on deposits. The organization emphasizes community banking with a focus on personal, business, and wealth management services. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including multiple checking account tiers (Optimum, e-ssentials, and Traditional Checking), savings vehicles (Companion Savings, Regular Savings, CNSaver, and Money Market Accounts), Certificates of Deposit with online opening capabilities, and various loan products. Their mortgage division provides portfolio mortgages, fixed-rate mortgages, construction mortgages, and specialized programs like the Homebuyer Dream Program. They also offer home equity solutions, auto/recreation loans, personal loans, and debt consolidation options. Business customers can access commercial loans, equipment financing, and business checking accounts. Wealth management services include investments, financial planning, trust services, estate planning, and private banking for higher-net-worth clients. Canandaigua National Bank distinguishes itself through regional integration and community commitment, evidenced by scholarship programs (Reddington Scholarship with annual deadlines) and local hiring practices. The bank provides modern digital banking channels including online banking, a CNB Mobile Banking App, mobile deposit, CNBillPay, text banking (CNBanker Voice), and debit card management. They offer specialized tools like loan calculators, mortgage calculators, and financial planning resources. The institution maintains a Security Center and provides customer support via phone, live chat, and multiple contact options. Their digital presence includes myCNB360 wealth portal and application ePortal for streamlined account management. As a regional community bank, Canandaigua National Bank is well-suited for individuals and businesses in its service area seeking personalized banking relationships and comprehensive financial services. However, customers should note that geographic service limitations may apply, and the bank experiences scheduled system maintenance (as noted: 4/18 from 1:30pm-6:30pm affecting fund transfers, stop payments, and balance updates). The institution competes with larger national banks but may offer more localized decision-making and community focus.
services: Personal checking accounts (Optimum, e-ssentials, Traditional Checking)
Savings accounts and Money Market Accounts
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with online opening
Home purchase and refinance mortgages (fixed-rate, portfolio, construction)
Home equity solutions and HELOC products
Online banking and CNB Mobile Banking App
Mobile deposit and CNBillPay bill payment
Text banking (CNBanker Voice) and debit card management
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Multiple checking account options (Optimum, e-ssentials, Traditional) with comparison tools to match customer needs
Comprehensive mortgage programs including fixed-rate, construction, portfolio, and specialized Homebuyer Dream Program
Digital banking suite including mobile app, mobile deposit, CNBillPay, and text banking (CNBanker Voice)
Wealth management services with dedicated myCNB360 portal, financial planning, and trust/estate services
Community-focused with scholarship programs and local hiring initiatives
Online Certificate of Deposit opening available for convenience
Multiple contact channels: phone (800) 724-2621 / (585) 394-4260, live chat, and local branches
cons: Geographic service limitations to Greater Rochester and Finger Lakes, NY region only
Scheduled system maintenance periods render fund transfers, stop payments, and balance updates unavailable (example: 4/18 1:30pm-6:30pm)
New accounts go into pending status for 1-2 days during maintenance windows
Limited information on specific APR rates, fees, or minimum balance requirements available on homepage
No mention of competitive rate guarantees or promotional offers compared to national competitors
best_for: Residents and businesses in Greater Rochester and Finger Lakes, NY seeking community banking relationships
Mortgage borrowers interested in specialized programs like the Homebuyer Dream Program or construction financing
High-net-worth individuals and families requiring wealth management, trust, and estate planning services
Small business owners needing commercial loans, equipment financing, and business checking solutions
diagnosis: Canandaigua National Bank is best for individuals and businesses in Greater Rochester and Finger Lakes, NY seeking comprehensive banking services with community focus, including mortgages, loans, and wealth management. The main caveat is that this is a regional bank with geographic service limitations outside its NY service area, and customers should plan around scheduled system maintenance windows that temporarily disable key services.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: The Canandaigua National Bank and Trust Company
